name: eval-6-vue-renderer
prompt:
Set up a Rete.js v2 visual node editor using Vue 3 instead of React. Create:
1. editor.ts — full plugin stack using VuePlugin from rete-vue-plugin, with VueArea2D<Schemes> as the AreaExtra type, plugin order: editor.use(area) → area.use(connection) → area.use(render), and two node types (NumberNode, AddNode)
2. NodeEditor.vue — Vue SFC component that mounts the editor using the useRete composable from rete-vue-plugin (NOT onMounted/onBeforeUnmount manually)
Important: Vue renderer does NOT need createRoot.
assertions: uses-vue-plugin: imports and uses VuePlugin from rete-vue-plugin
uses-use-rete-composable: NodeEditor.vue uses useRete from rete-vue-plugin, not manual onMounted/onBeforeUnmount
no-create-root: does NOT pass {createRoot} (not needed for Vue renderer)
correct-plugin-order: editor.use(area) then area.use(connection) then area.use(render)
